# GowriAI.Ventures

GowriAI.Ventures builds and backs practical AI products across security, quantitative reasoning, valuation, and applied enterprise workflows.

## Site
- Homepage: https://gowriai.ventures/
- Contact: mailto:hello@gowriai.ventures

## Initiatives
- AgentFuzz.ai: https://agentfuzz.ai
  AI vulnerability assessment and assurance aligned with OWASP LLM Top 10 and NIST AI RMF.
- ThreatVault.ai: https://threatvault.ai
  Curated AI threat intelligence, adversarial technique libraries, and automated coverage analysis for teams securing AI systems.
  In partnership with Cesta: https://cestatech.com/
- Mathz.app: https://mathz.app
  Interactive math lessons from Algebra to Calculus focused on intuition through sliders, graphs, and direct manipulation.
- Parametri.ai: https://parametri.ai/
  AI for engineering and construction workflows, turning blueprints and floor plans into intelligent, interactive documents.

## Capabilities
- LLM systems and agentic workflows
- Retrieval, search, and knowledge systems
- Vision, document understanding, and evaluation systems
- Applied AI product design across security, reasoning, and enterprise workflows
